class.name: CassieCurvenetExtractor
class.brief_description: Mesh-to-curvenet auto-extractor — Step 1.0 of the Pixar curvenet rig.
class.description: Three passes: per-edge feature scoring (dihedral angle + boundary-edge boost), adaptive thresholding (log-sweep over top-K to hit [code]target_curve_count[/code]), and graph simplification via [code]cassie_rdp_reduce[/code] + [code]cassie_fit_curve[/code]. Emits the same Dictionary shape that [method CassieCurvenet.build_from_graph] consumes.

method.name: extract
method.description: Convenience wrapper: extracts the graph data, populates a fresh [CassieCurvenet], binds it to [param patch], updates the rest pose, and runs [method CassieCurvenet.compute_orientations]. Returns the ready-to-use curvenet.

method.name: extract_graph_data
method.description: Returns the graph-data Dictionary with keys [code]"curves"[/code] (TypedArray of [CassieFinalStroke]) and [code]"nodes"[/code] (Array of [code]{ "id", "position", "incident_curve_ids" }[/code]). Every curve's start endpoint shows up in exactly one node's [code]incident_curve_ids[/code], same for its end endpoint — the invariant [method CassieCurvenet.compute_orientations] relies on.
